svg.text: GAL22V10 AND Array — JEDEC Fuse Map (fuses 0 – 5807)
132 rows × 44 columns | fuse address = row × 44 + column
row r, col c → fuse r×44+c
OLMC9 (pin 23), 1st PT row = 2, pin 2 (I1) true literal:
Fuse value: 0 = literal connected to AND gate (active) 1 = disconnected (don't-care). All-ones row = disabled product term.
